title: Create work items from your Plan's calendar view (Premium and Enterprise)
description:
You can now create work items directly from a Plan's calendar view. This brings the same quick-create experience available in other calendars to your Plans, making it easier to add and manage work items without leaving the calendar view (Premium and Enterprise only). To create a work item in your Plan's calendar view: Go to your Plan in Jira.
	Go to the calendar view.
	Select the date or time slot where you want to add a new work item.
	Use the Create option that appears to add your work item de
